mapper.select: select a.tran_date , a.seq , a.tran_type_cd , d.storage_name as srcStorageName , c.member_nm as managerName , a.manager_id , a.etc , a.src_storage_cd , a.tran_id from tb_inv_tran_mst a inner join tb_inv_tran_item b on a.tran_id = b.tran_id inner join tb_users c on c.user_id = a.manager_id left outer join tb_storage_mst d on d.storage_cd = a.src_storage_cd where a.tran_id = #{tranId}
select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.test_no ,a.qty ,a.etc ,a.item_type_cd ,a.tran_item_id ,a.tran_id from tb_inv_tran_item a where a.tran_id = #{tranId}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_inv_tran_mst ( tran_date, seq, tran_type_cd, src_storage_cd, manager_id, etc, tran_status, end_yn, reg_id, upd_id) values ( #{tranDate}, #{seq}, #{tranTypeCd}, #{srcStorageCd}, #{managerId}, #{etc}, 'C', 'Y', #{userId}, #{userId} )

insert into tb_inv_tran_item ( tran_id, item_type_cd, item_cd, item_name, test_no, qty, lot_no, reg_id, upd_id) values ( #{tranId}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{itemCd}, #{itemName}, #{testNo}, #{qty}, #{lotNo}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
